# EXECUTIVE CASE SUMMARY
The patient, <PERSON_1>, suffered a right shoulder injury after slipping on ice, resulting in a contusion/sprain and later diagnosed with a full-thickness tear of the supraspinatus tendon (Rotator Cuff) with retraction. The patient underwent conservative treatment but showed no improvement, leading to a scheduled Right Shoulder Arthroscopy with Rotator Cuff Repair. The total new charges for the treatments and procedures amount to $17,950.00, with an additional $400.00 from the initial urgent care visit.
